summary: Completed testing of iteration 9 features: (1) DELETE /api/admin/bookings/{booking_id} endpoint for deleting bookings, (2) PUT /api/admin/settings with absolute photo_storage_path support, (3) /booking page package cards with full details. All 8 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: PUT /api/admin/settings persists storage path to database
GET /api/packages returns packages with features, description, notes, recommended_for
GET /api/admin/bookings returns bookings list for admin dashboard
Admin Dashboard bookings list shows trash/delete icon on each booking row (15 found)
Admin Dashboard BookingDetails panel has 'Delete Booking' button at bottom
/booking page shows 3 package cards with full details
/booking page package cards show 'WHAT'S INCLUDED' section with features list
/booking page package cards show notes section
/booking page package cards show 'Best for' recommendation text
Admin Settings page shows Storage Path input with helper text
Admin Settings helper text mentions 'absolute path' with examples (D:/Photos, /mnt/storage)
Admin Settings helper text mentions folder will be created automatically
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings for deletion testing (auto-cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features verified working: (1) DELETE /api/admin/bookings/{booking_id} endpoint deletes booking and associated photos, returns 404 for nonexistent, requires admin auth, (2) PUT /api/admin/settings accepts any absolute path for photo_storage_path and creates directory automatically, (3) /booking page package cards now show full details including name, price, description, features list with checkmarks, notes (if present), and 'Best for' recommendation text. Admin Dashboard has delete icons on booking rows and 'Delete Booking' button in details panel. Admin Settings has helper text explaining absolute paths with examples. Email notifications remain MOCKED when SMTP not configured.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email notifications fall back to mock mode when SMTP is not configured. Credentials are logged to console.

booking_deletion_api.details: DELETE /api/admin/bookings/{booking_id} deletes booking and associated photos, returns {message: 'Booking deleted successfully'}

booking_deletion_ui.details: Admin Dashboard shows trash icon on each booking row and 'Delete Booking' button in details panel

storage_path_absolute.details: PUT /api/admin/settings accepts absolute paths like /tmp/test_absolute_path and creates directory

storage_path_helper_text.details: Admin Settings shows helper text: 'Any absolute path (e.g. D:/Photos, /mnt/storage). Folder will be created automatically.'

booking_page_package_cards.details: Package cards show name, price, description, features list with checkmarks, notes, and 'Best for' text
